scripts.deploy:prod: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=prod -e ../../.env.production -- bun ../alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy stateHub
scripts.deploy:staging: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=staging -e ../../.env.staging -- bun ../alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts deploy stateHub
scripts.destroy:prod: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=prod -e ../../.env.production -- bun ../alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts destroy stateHub
scripts.destroy:staging: bunx dotenv-cli -v STAGE=staging -e ../../.env.staging -- bun ../alchemy-utils/src/alchemy-cli.ts destroy stateHub
